name: r3f-rag-viz
description: Editable 3D visualization for RAG & knowledge graphs

scripts.build: npm run build -w @r3f-rag-viz/core && npm run build -w @r3f-rag-viz/react && npm run build -w demo
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @r3f-rag-viz/core && npm run build -w @r3f-rag-viz/react
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @r3f-rag-viz/core && npm run typecheck -w @r3f-rag-viz/react && npm run typecheck -w demo
